migrations.name: create_broker_position_snapshot_store_v1
statements:
CREATE TABLE internal_position_snapshot_attempts (
    snapshot_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    account_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    captured_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    published_at_utc TEXT,
    status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('WRITING', 'COMPLETE', 'FAILED')),
    row_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (row_count >= 0),
    source_session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    error_text TEXT,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE internal_broker_position_rows (
    snapshot_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    row_ordinal INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (row_ordinal >= 0),
    con_id INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (con_id > 0),
    local_symbol TEXT,
    symbol TEXT NOT NULL,
    sec_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    exchange TEXT,
    currency TEXT,
    signed_quantity REAL NOT NULL CHECK (signed_quantity != 0),
    average_cost REAL,
    PRIMARY KEY (snapshot_id, row_ordinal),
    UNIQUE (snapshot_id, con_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (snapshot_id)
        REFERENCES internal_position_snapshot_attempts(snapshot_id)
        ON DELETE CASCADE
)

CREATE TABLE internal_position_feed_state (
    singleton_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY CHECK (singleton_id = 1),
    latest_complete_snapshot_id TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (latest_complete_snapshot_id)
        REFERENCES internal_position_snapshot_attempts(snapshot_id)
)

INSERT INTO internal_position_feed_state (
    singleton_id,
    latest_complete_snapshot_id
) VALUES (1, NULL)

CREATE VIEW public_broker_position_snapshots_v1 AS
SELECT
    snapshot_id,
    account_id,
    captured_at_utc,
    published_at_utc,
    status,
    row_count,
    source_session_id
FROM internal_position_snapshot_attempts
WHERE status = 'COMPLETE'

CREATE VIEW public_broker_position_rows_v1 AS
SELECT
    row.snapshot_id,
    row.row_ordinal,
    row.con_id,
    row.local_symbol,
    row.symbol,
    row.sec_type,
    row.exchange,
    row.currency,
    row.signed_quantity,
    row.average_cost
FROM internal_broker_position_rows AS row
JOIN internal_position_snapshot_attempts AS snapshot
  ON snapshot.snapshot_id = row.snapshot_id
WHERE snapshot.status = 'COMPLETE'

CREATE VIEW public_broker_position_latest_v1 AS
SELECT
    snapshot.snapshot_id,
    snapshot.account_id,
    snapshot.captured_at_utc,
    snapshot.published_at_utc,
    snapshot.status,
    snapshot.row_count,
    snapshot.source_session_id
FROM internal_position_feed_state AS state
JOIN internal_position_snapshot_attempts AS snapshot
  ON snapshot.snapshot_id = state.latest_complete_snapshot_id
WHERE state.singleton_id = 1
  AND snapshot.status = 'COMPLETE'
